vulnerabilities.name: Broken Object Property Level Authorization

details.description: POST /workshop/api/shop/products returns **required** sensitive field 'image_url'. Enforce field-level authorization or split response models.

vulnerabilities.recommendation: Enforce field-level authorization and scoped models.

vulnerabilities.name: SSRF Risk (Request Body)

details.description: Endpoint POST /workshop/api/shop/products request body field 'image_url' looks like a URL but has no enum/pattern or allow-list mention in description.

vulnerabilities.recommendation: Restrict URL fields in bodies with enum/pattern.

vulnerabilities.name: Auth Consistency

details.description: POST /workshop/api/shop/products uses security but does not declare 401, 403 response(s).

vulnerabilities.recommendation: Do not disable auth on state-changing operations; model 401/403 when security is required.

vulnerabilities.name: SSRF Hardening (URL Inputs)

details.description: Request body URL-like field 'image_url' in POST /workshop/api/shop/products lacks hardened constraints (https-only/allow-list/deny-list).

vulnerabilities.recommendation: Enforce https-only, host allow-list, and deny-list for URL inputs.

vulnerabilities.name: SSRF Hardening (URL Inputs)

details.description: URL-like variant 'price' (oneOf/anyOf) in POST /workshop/api/shop/products lacks hardened constraints (https-only/allow-list/deny-list).

vulnerabilities.recommendation: Enforce https-only, host allow-list, and deny-list for URL inputs.

vulnerabilities.name: Schema Sensitive Fields Exposure

details.description: Sensitive-looking field 'Order.product.image_url' present in schema 'Order'.

vulnerabilities.recommendation: Review schema definitions; informational unless corroborated.

vulnerabilities.name: Schema Sensitive Fields Exposure

details.description: Sensitive-looking field 'NewProduct.image_url' present in schema 'NewProduct'.

vulnerabilities.recommendation: Review schema definitions; informational unless corroborated.

vulnerabilities.name: Unsafe Consumption of APIs

details.description: Insecure server URL 'http://localhost:8888' defined. Use HTTPS.

vulnerabilities.recommendation: Use HTTPS for servers.

vulnerabilities.name: Documentation Hint: Rate-Limit Headers

details.description: Documentation hint (per tag 'Identity / Auth'): declare rate-limit headers (x-rate-limit-limit, x-rate-limit-remaining, x-rate-limit-reset). 7 endpoint(s) missing.

vulnerabilities.recommendation: Document rate limit headers; enforce at runtime.

vulnerabilities.name: Documentation Hint: Security Headers

details.description: Documentation hint (per tag 'Identity / Auth'): add common security headers in responses (missing in spec: content-security-policy, cross-origin-opener-policy, referrer-policy, strict-transport-security, x-content-type-options, x-frame-options). 7 endpoint(s) affected.

vulnerabilities.recommendation: Document common security headers; verify dynamically.

vulnerabilities.name: Unsafe GET (Side Effects)

details.description: GET /workshop/api/mechanic/receive_report appears to create/modify state (verbs/i18n).

evidence.summary: Create and Assign a Service Report
evidence.description: Used to create the service report and assign to the mechanic

vulnerabilities.recommendation: Ensure GET is safe/idempotent; move side-effecting actions to POST/PUT/PATCH.
